name: Matthew
oracleText:
When Matthew enters the battlefield, investigate.
Whenever you sacrifice a Clue or Treasure, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Theodoor van Loon's "Calling of Saint Matthew" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Called from the Tax Booth

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Theodoor van Loon, Calling of Saint Matthew
classics.sourceNotes: A dedicated calling-of-Matthew composition fits the tax-booth card cleanly.
